directives:
**DIRECTIVE 1**: Technical Operations Lead must complete full diagnostic of X scraping pipeline by 2026-05-21 1200h. Success metric: >90% post collection rate restored.

**DIRECTIVE 2**: Intelligence Analyst must establish manual verification protocols for all geopolitical and tech industry signals by 2026-05-21 1800h. Success metric: Source authenticity confidence scores implemented.

**DIRECTIVE 3**: War Room Commander must implement emergency intelligence protocols for reduced-capacity operations by 2026-05-21 0900h. Success metric: Alternative intelligence collection methods activated.

**DIRECTIVE 4**: Data Engineering must create automated alerts for collection failure rates >20% by 2026-05-21 1500h. Success metric: Real-time monitoring dashboard operational.

**DIRECTIVE 5**: All operational decisions requiring external intelligence must receive manual War Room Commander approval until collection restoration. Success metric: Zero decisions made on compromised data.
